document_text:
Page 1 of 2
Title: Coastal Mangrove Resilience in Davao Gulf
Authors: Ana Reyes; Mark Dela Cruz
Abstract: This study measures mangrove recovery after community restoration.
Methodology: Researchers compared thirty restored plots with thirty control plots over twelve months.
Results: Restored plots showed higher seedling survival.
Keywords: mangrove, restoration, Davao Gulf
Page 2 of 2
The evidence supports SDG 14 because the work concerns coastal ecosystems.
